notes: + New Estimate opens the builder (Jo's default = V2, so it goes straight to the V2 builder).
Classic button opens the Classic step-1 builder.
Back-to-CRM breadcrumb present on the estimate list.
'Build your first estimate' empty-state CTA — list has 6 estimates, empty state not reachable.
Classic Builder option = the Classic button (showEstimateTypeSelector exists; picker is skipped when a default type is set).
V2 Builder option = the + New Estimate default path (opens V2).
Picker Cancel — type picker is skipped (default V2), so its Cancel isn't surfaced.
Card Edit (data-act=open) opens the V2 builder pre-loaded with the estimate's data.
Card Duplicate creates a copy (7->8 cards; '(copy)' suffix); deleted after.
Card Rename: prompt 'Rename estimate:' -> card title updates ('ZZ_QA Renamed').
Card Assign opens a lead-picker modal (cancelled at boundary — no assignment fired).
Card Delete: confirm 'Delete X? This cannot be undone.' -> removed. Deleted the renamed UNTITLED throwaway + its duplicate (cleanup; list 8->6).
Assigned-lead chip renders ('Unassigned' chip shown on unassigned cards; assigned variant via the Assign flow).
V2 builder ✕ Close closes the full-page builder.
Per-SQ mode tab activates + shows per-sq layout.
Line-Item mode tab activates (default) + shows the 270-item catalog.
Insurance job-mode tab activates (default).
Cash job-mode tab activates (cashActive=true).
Good tier tab activates.
Better tier tab activates (default).
Best tier tab activates. (All three tier totals shown simultaneously; tier tab selects the active/save tier — matches estimate-qa canonical-total finding.)
County/Jurisdiction select present (Hamilton County, OH).
